user_query: I'm an app developer working on a new game. Can you give me insights into the app market by providing the rental ratings and amenities of gaming apps? Also, suggest some new iOS games that have recently been released. Additionally, recommend some YouTube videos related to game development and app marketing.

TaskList.description: Gather rental ratings and amenities of existing gaming apps from the app market.
Retrieve a list of new iOS games that have recently been released.
Find and recommend YouTube videos related to game development and app marketing.
